name: Ossan's Love Returns
original_name: おっさんずラブ-リターンズ-
overview: Marital bliss gets complicated for two newlyweds when their new housekeeper turns out to be their former boss! Will their old love triangle resurface?

trailers.title: Thai BL Stars EarthMix make a cameo in EP4 of  Japanese BL "Ossan's Love Returns"! 😍
